title: Repeatable Trial Vaults
description: Consume a trial key to be able to use the trial vault again
body:
![Title](https://i.imgur.com/wUICMQE.png)

![](https://imgur.com/A7U3oXE.png)[Join my Discord](https://discord.gg/4tPfwjn) ![](https://imgur.com/m9xyJSE.png) [Support me on Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/buuz135) ![](https://imgur.com/h0VJ7eQ.png) [Follow me on twitter](https://twitter.com/Buuz135mods)

A simple mod that will allow to reset trial vaults by consuming another key (by default) so you can keep claiming the loot.

This mod can be server side only but having it on the client it will show what items can reset the vaults.

You can modify what items can reset vaults by editing the `repeatable_trial_vaults:can_reset_trial_vaults` item tag.
